briefdescription.para: signal about face selection changing, triggered in selectFaces
signal about mesh changing, triggered in setDirtyFlag
Texture options.
vertices coordinates in ancillary texture
toggle per-face or per-vertex properties

detaileddescription.para: really it shoud be one enum Shading {None, Flat, Smooth, Crease} but for back capability it is easier to add global flag

briefdescription.para: scale object size (all point positions)
mesh object can be seen if the mesh has at least one edge

detaileddescription.para: does the object have any model available (but possibly empty), e.g. ObjectMesh has valid mesh() or ObjectPoints has valid pointCloud()

briefdescription.para: reinterpret_cast to avoid making a copy of shared_ptr

simplesect.para: the pair ( mesh, selected triangles ) if any triangle is selected or whole mesh otherwise

detaileddescription.para: clones this object only, without its children, making new object the owner of all copied resources
clones this object only, without its children, making new object to share resources with this object

sets some dirty flags for the object (to force its visual update)
mask
is a union of DirtyFlags flags
invalidateCaches
whether to automatically invalidate model caches (pass false here if you manually update the caches)

this is a faster version of setDirtyFlags(), which does not invalidate metrics cache (area, volume, ...); the user is responsible for calling invalidateMetricsCache( mask ) or setDirtyFlags( mask ) at the end of mesh editing; DANGER: all cached values returned until then can be outdated

briefdescription.para: invalidates same caches with mesh metrics (area, volume, ...) as by setDirtyFlags( mask )
returns colors of selected triangles
sets colors of selected triangles
returns colors of selected edges
sets colors of selected edges
set all object solid colors (front/back/etc.) from other object for all viewports
Edges on mesh, that will have sharp visualization even with smooth shading.
sets flat (true) or smooth (false) shading
Returns true if this class supports the property type. Otherwise passing it to the functions below is illegal.
get all visualize properties masks
returns mask of viewports where given property is set
provides read-only access to whole ObjectMeshData
sets whole new ObjectMeshData
swaps whole ObjectMeshData with given argument
returns per-vertex colors of the object
sets per-vertex colors of the object
swaps per-vertex colors of the object with given argument

simplesect.para: this ctor is public only for std::make_shared used inside clone()

briefdescription.para: returns first texture in the vector. If there is no textures, returns empty texture
for backward compatibility

detaileddescription.para: the texture ids for the faces if more than one texture is used to texture the object texture coordinates (data_.uvCoordinates) at a point can belong to different textures, depending on which face the point belongs to

briefdescription.para: copies texture, UV-coordinates and vertex colors from given source object
copies vertex colors from given source object
ancillary texture can be used to have custom features visualization without affecting real one
returns true if the object must be redrawn (due to dirty flags) in one of specified viewports
returns cached information whether the mesh is closed

detaileddescription.para: returns cached bounding box of this mesh object in world coordinates; if you need bounding box in local coordinates please call getBoundingBox()

briefdescription.para: returns cached information about the number of selected faces in the mesh
returns cached information about the number of selected undirected edges in the mesh
returns cached information about the number of crease undirected edges in the mesh
returns cached summed area of mesh triangles
returns cached area of selected triangles
returns cached volume of space surrounded by the mesh, which is valid only if mesh is closed
returns cached average edge length
returns cached information about the number of undirected edges in the mesh
returns cached information about the number of holes in the mesh
returns cached information about the number of components in the mesh
returns cached information about the number of handles in the mesh
returns the amount of memory this object occupies on heap
returns overriden file extension used to serialize mesh inside this object, nullptr means defaultSerializeMeshFormat()
returns overriden file extension used to serialize mesh inside this object if set, or defaultSerializeMeshFormat().c_str() otherwise; never returns nullptr

detaileddescription.para: overrides file extension used to serialize mesh inside this object: must start from '.', nullptr means serialize in defaultSerializeMeshFormat()

briefdescription.para: reset basic object colors to their default values from the current theme
reset all object colors to their default values from the current theme
return hash of model (or hash object pointer if object has no model)
return true if model of current object equals to model (the same) of other
swaps this object with other

detaileddescription.para: swaps signals, used in swap function to return back signals after swapBase_ pls call Parent::swapSignals_ first when overriding this function

memberdef.definition: virtual MRMESH_API Expected< std::future< Expected< void > > > MR::ObjectMeshHolder::serializeModel_
memberdef.name: serializeModel_

detaileddescription.para: Creates future to save object model (e.g. mesh) in given file path is full filename without extension

Write parameters to given Json::Value,
if you override this method, please call Base::serializeFields_(root) in the beginning

Reads parameters from json value
if you override this method, please call Base::deserializeFields_(root) in the beginning

briefdescription.para: Reads model from file.
shares model from other object
set all visualize properties masks

detaileddescription.para: each renderable child of VisualObject should implement this method and assign renderObj_ inside

briefdescription.para: this is private function to set default colors of this type (ObjectMeshHolder) in constructor only
set default scene-related properties

detaileddescription.para: an object that stores a mesh
